script:
#!/bin/bash
set +e
echo '=== faithful claude call as aixa: with --append-system-prompt ==='
runuser -u aixa -- bash -c 'cd /home/aixa && echo "What is 2 plus 2? Just the number." | timeout 120 /home/azureuser/.npm-global/bin/claude -p --model claude-opus-4-7 --dangerously-skip-permissions --append-system-prompt "You are a helpful assistant. Answer briefly." > /tmp/aixa_faithful 2>/tmp/aixa_faithful_err; echo "rc=$?"; echo "--stdout--"; head -c 800 /tmp/aixa_faithful; echo; echo "--stderr--"; head -c 800 /tmp/aixa_faithful_err'
echo '=== heather (known-good per-user) same call ==='
runuser -u heather -- bash -c 'cd /home/heather && echo "What is 2 plus 2? Just the number." | timeout 120 /home/azureuser/.npm-global/bin/claude -p --model claude-opus-4-7 --dangerously-skip-permissions --append-system-prompt "You are a helpful assistant. Answer briefly." > /tmp/heather_test 2>/tmp/heather_err; echo "rc=$?"; echo "--stdout--"; head -c 800 /tmp/heather_test; echo; echo "--stderr--"; head -c 800 /tmp/heather_err'
echo '=== mskai (known-good azureuser) same call ==='
runuser -u azureuser -- bash -c 'cd /home/azureuser && echo "What is 2 plus 2? Just the number." | timeout 120 /home/azureuser/.npm-global/bin/claude -p --model claude-opus-4-7 --dangerously-skip-permissions --append-system-prompt "You are a helpful assistant. Answer briefly." > /tmp/mskai_test 2>/tmp/mskai_err; echo "rc=$?"; echo "--stdout--"; head -c 800 /tmp/mskai_test; echo; echo "--stderr--"; head -c 800 /tmp/mskai_err'
echo '===END==='
